title: StrangeCraft
description: a Life Is Strange themed Minecraft Mod.
body:
This is a mod based on the Life Is Strange series of games, but primarily focuses on Life Is Strange 1.

# Features:
- You can take photos with the Polaroid camera and use them to jump right back to that point. Be careful, though, there's a small chance of it spawning a tornado!
- Music discs with note block covers of a bunch of songs from the various Life Is Strange games
- Max's bag, used to label Polaroids
- Chloe's beanie, a decorative hat
- Hawt Dawg Man plushie, a purely decorative plush.
- Lighthouses that spawn on beaches and may contain the Hawt Dawg Man plush
- Various paintings based on Life Is Strange.
